REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON JUN-20-2013. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 503 ON MAR-24-2014 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. THE COURT AND COUNSELS CONFER REGARDING EXPERT WITNESS DEMANDS AND EXPERT WITNESS DEPOSITION NOTICES AS NOTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT. DEMAND FOR EXPERTS SHALL BE SIMULTANEOUS EXCHANGES 50 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL AND ALL THE REPORTS PURSUANT TO CODE. EACH SIDE INFORM THE OTHER 35 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL WHICH EXPERTS THEY ARE GOING TO TAKE THE DEPOSITION OF AND THEN SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITION. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM BY BERRY & BERRY. LIV/ASB (BRAYTON). JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: KIM RICHARDSON, CSR#5915 FROM AIKEN WELCH (510)451-1580 FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL BERRY & BERRY. (206)

MASTER JURY ASBESTOS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2014 ASSIGNED TO ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-07-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 611, VISITING JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR. PLAINTIFF EXERCISED A 170.6 AS TO JUDGE MARLA MILLER AND THE COURT ACCEPTED THE CHALLENGE AS TIMELY. DEFENDANT THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING CO. EXERCISED A 170.6 CCP PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO JUDGE NEWTON LAM. THE COURT ACCEPTED THE CHALLENGE AS TIMELY. THE COURT ORDERED PARTIES TO HAVE A LIMIT OF 5 MOTIONS IN LIMINE PER EACH SIDE THAT ARE NOT TO EXCEED 5 PAGES. THE PLAINTIFF IS ALSO REQUESTING DEFENDANTS TO HAVE A COMPREHENSIVE INDEX. IF A DEFENDANT NEEDS A CASE SPECIFIC OR DEFENDANT SPECIFIC MIL IN ADDITION TO THE 5 MIL'S THAT ARE BEING FILED JOINTLY, PARTIES NEED TO MEET AND CONFER WITH FELLOW CO-DEFENDANTS AND THEN MEET AND CONFER WITH PLAINTIFF, THEN SUBMIT A DECLARATION BY 3/28/14 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 503 WITH ALL OF THE MOTIONS IN LIMINE FILED AS WELL. PARTIES NEED TO WORK ON THE PAGE LINE DESIGNATIONS AND SUBMIT A JOINT LETTER TO THE COURT REGARDING THE STATUS. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: RVELUZ; COURT REPORTER: JENNIFER SEELENBACHER, CSR#11878, (510)451-1580. (503)
